system_configuration.note: User Account Control (UAC) is disabled on this system. Task Scheduler operations and other administrative tasks can be performed without UAC elevation prompts.

task_scheduler_behavior.note: Even with UAC disabled, creating system-level scheduled tasks (ONSTART trigger) still requires administrator privileges. This is a Windows security restriction.
task_scheduler_behavior.workaround_implemented: Startup folder shortcut created as alternative method

automation_notes.task_installation: When UAC is disabled, task installation scripts should attempt direct installation without elevation prompts
automation_notes.error_handling: If access denied errors occur for Task Scheduler, use Startup folder method as alternative
automation_notes.current_solution: Startup folder shortcut - no admin privileges required, runs at user login
